description: Style NoteTip Topp sandals offer enhanced comfort and superior style. Brave the monsoon or beat the summer heat with this durable pair! This versatile sandals can be paired with just about anything - from denims to kurtas.Product DetailsBlue and black printed thong style upper with a printed footbedTough TPU outsole, upraised at the heel, has grooves all overMaterial and careSyntheticWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
